description:
Product information:
Fabric name: chemical fiber blended
Main fabric composition: polyester fiber (polyester)
The content of the main fabric ingredient: 71%-80%
Main fabric composition 2: Chlorine fiber (chlorinated fiber)
The content of main fabric ingredient 2: 10%-29%
Style: leisure
Pants length: Nine pants
Style: Pencil Pants/Small Pants
Thickness: General
Function: hip lift, self-cultivation, breathable, warmth, sweat absorption, slimming, anti-sliding, anti-odor
Color: pink, gray, black, blue, green

Size Information:
Size: S, M, L

SIZESML
LENGTH788082

HIP373941

Note：
1. Asian sizes are 1 to 2 sizes smaller than European and American people. Choose the larger size if your size between two sizes. Please allow 2-3cm differences due to manual measurement. 
2. Please check the size chart carefully before you buy the item, if you don't know how to choose size, please contact our customer service.
3.As you know, the different computers display colors differently, the color of the actual item may vary slightly from the following images.
